exercises.title: Anyon Fusion Calculator
exercises.description: Implement fusion rules for surface code anyons.
tasks: Define anyon types: 1 (vacuum), e, m, ε (fermion)
Implement fusion rules (e×e=1, m×m=1, e×m=ε, etc.)
hints: Use string labels for anyon types

exercises.title: Braiding Phase Calculator
exercises.description: Compute braiding phases for abelian anyons.
tasks: Implement phase accumulation for e-e braiding
Implement mutual braiding phase (e around m)
Track phases for sequences of braidings

exercises.title: World Line Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate anyon world lines in space-time.
tasks: Detect braiding events from world line crossings
hints: Time is vertical, space is horizontal

exercises.title: Ising Anyon Gate Calculator
exercises.description: Compute gates from Ising anyon braiding.
tasks: Define Ising anyon fusion rules (σ×σ = 1 + ψ)
Compute state space dimension for n σ-anyons
hints: State space for 2n σ's has dimension 2^(n-1)
R-matrix is 2×2 for pair in {1, ψ} basis
Braiding different pairs gives different gates
Check: does order of braiding matter?
